chapter_title.ar: باب الرَّجُلِ يُدْخِلُ يَدَهُ فِي الْإِنَاءِ قَبْلَ أَنْ يَغْسِلَهَا وَ الْحَدِّ فِي غَسْلِ الْيَدَيْنِ مِنَ الْجَنَابَةِ وَ الْبَوْلِ وَ الْغَائِطِ وَ النَّوْمِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 8 – The man enters his hand into the vessel before he washes it, and the limit with regards to washing of the two hands from the sexual impurity, and the urine, and the faeces, and the sleep

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: سكت عنه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/42)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: سكت عنه - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/42)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) الرَّجُلُ يَضَعُ الْكُوزَ الَّذِي يَغْرِفُ بِهِ مِنَ الْحُبِّ فِي مَكَانٍ قَذِرٍ ثُمَّ يُدْخِلُهُ الْحُبَّ قَالَ يَصُبُّ مِنَ الْمَاءِ ثَلَاثَةَ أَكُفٍّ ثُمَّ يَدْلُكُ الْكُوزَ .

en.hubeali: Ali Bin Muhammad, from Sahl, from the one who mentioned it, from Yunus, from Bakkar Bin Abu Bakr who said,

‘I said to Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The man places the mug which he scoops with from the container, in a dirty place, then he enters it into the container’. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should pour out three hand-scoops of the water then rub the mug’.
en.sarwar: 6. Ali ibn Muhammad has narrated from Sahl from those whom he has mentioned from Yunus from Bakkar ibn abu Bakr who has said the following: “I once asked abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the case of a mug with which one takes water from a large water container but one places it on a dirty place, then immerses it in the large water container. He (the Imam) said, ‘He must pour water on the mug three times and rub it.’”
